label: capability search • workflow • multi-match ranking
query: I have a PDF I need to work with
notes: Probes ranking quality: three PDF-related workflows are seeded and the broad query should surface at least two of them. A single-hit pass means the embedder picked one PDF workflow and dropped the others; we want to see whether the lane preserves multiple related candidates above the acceptance floor.

seedWorkflows.name: summarize_pdf
seedWorkflows.description: Generate a summary of the contents of a PDF document

seedWorkflows.name: extract_pdf_tables
seedWorkflows.description: Extract tables from a PDF document into structured rows

seedWorkflows.name: redact_pdf_pii
seedWorkflows.description: Redact personally identifying information in a PDF document

seedWorkflows.name: fetch_stock_price
seedWorkflows.description: Look up the current stock price for a ticker symbol
